query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'competitions' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('prizePool', 'participantMode', 'duelPairId', 'leverage', 'createdAt', 'updatedAt', 'maxLeverage', 'allowedLeverage', 'showcaseMode');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mWBJwMymT3uxJ8c.d6db9e21a524 --database dRgYLfmNL5QAGwfaYvi5WU --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'competitions' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('prizePool', 'participantMode', 'duelPairId', 'leverage', 'createdAt', 'updatedAt', 'maxLeverage', 'allowedLeverage', 'showcaseMode');
stdout:
